title: Effect Tooltip Icons
description: Adds icons for status effects, with support for some mods.
body:
✨ Icon Effects Tooltip ✨

This resource pack adds icons for all status effects, making tooltips more visual, clear, and immersive.
It also includes compatibility with some mods that add new effects.

**Features**
- ✔ Minimalist & lightweight
- ✔ Vanilla-friendly pixel art style
- ✔ Works in tooltips for better clarity

Preview
🔸 Before (Default Minecraft)

![c](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ff9e9da5859e3fa6006e32f7c039cf37fdf0d9fa.png)

![v](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/395bffc71b84e16d1be17637607ad20a93f5eb75.png)

Tooltips show only text, making it harder to identify effects quickly.



🔹 After (With this pack)

![ui](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/55b7bbf53f179dbffb1ed6fe1a96646811db7fbc.png)

![cv](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/61846122584187eea80d81b1ddc8d5e61aedfb02.png)

Each status effect has a icon, easy to recognize at a glance.

🌍 Supported Languages:
- English (United States)
- English (United Kingdom)
- English (Australia)
- English (Canada)
- English (New Zealand)
- English (Ireland)
- English (South Africa)
- English (Pirate Speak)
- Español (Argentina)
- Español (Chile)
- Español (Ecuador)
- Español (España)
- Español (Mexico)
- Español (Uruguay)
- Español (Venezuela)

🛠 Compatible with modded effects:
- Buzzier Bees
- Caverns And Chasms
- Effecticons
- Farmers Delight
- Illage And Spillage
- Legionary
- Loot N Explore
- Minecraft
- Quark
- Ranged Weapon
- Spell Power
- Stalwart Dungeons
- Unusual End
